dis_application_view.llm_summary: Lerato Mokoena is a ZA national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by EOS Bakehouse Ltd for IT project managers (SOC 2131). The application states salary £65,800 against the SOC going rate £58,200 and start date 2026-07-01. The corpus evidence supports approval: identity, sponsorship, English language, maintenance, TB where required, criminality, and immigration compliance checks are all satisfactory.
